name: Tomato Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle or Dutch oven, sauté mushrooms in 4 tablespoons butter until tender. Remove mushrooms and set aside.
2. In the same kettle, sauté onions, garlic, carrots, and celery in remaining butter until tender.
3. Stir in flour until smooth.
4. Add broth, tomatoes, tomato sauce, salt, pepper, and half of the mushrooms. Simmer, covered about 30 minutes.
5. Stir in parsley and remaining mushrooms. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until heated through.
6. Garnish each serving with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
